articles.title: In first Opening Day with Red Sox, Marcelo Mayer made quite the impression off the bench
articles.description:
“To be with the team throughout the whole season is special. And I was definitely tearing up in the anthem a little bit.”

The post In first Opening Day with Red Sox, Marcelo Mayer made quite the impression off the bench  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Marcelo Mayer made his MLB debut with the Red Sox on Opening Day, March 26, 2026.
Mayer expressed emotional connection to the team, tearing up during the national anthem.
His performance off the bench signals a promising future for the Red Sox and local fans.

articles.title: Lucky pup thanks NH firefighters for quick thinking that saved his life
articles.description:
When Ziggy the dog cut his leg on a solar light last month, his sitter enlisted the help of the Campton-Thornton Fire Department.

The post Lucky pup thanks NH firefighters for quick thinking that saved his life appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ziggy the dog injured his leg on a solar light last month.
Campton-Thornton Fire Department responded quickly to assist Ziggy's sitter.
The incident highlights the importance of local emergency services for pet safety.

articles.title: What’s causing my car to burn so much oil?
articles.description:
John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, hears from a reader whose 7-year-old car has begun to burn a lot of oil.

The post What’s causing my car to burn so much oil? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Paul from AAA Northeast addresses oil burning issues in 7-year-old cars.
Increased oil consumption can lead to costly repairs for Boston drivers.
Residents should monitor oil levels to avoid engine damage and ensure vehicle longevity.

articles.title: This Nantucket diner just sold its fifth million dollar prize in the last 2 years
articles.description:
The Old South Diner has sold its fifth million dollar lottery ticket win in the last two years, the state's lottery commission said.

The post This Nantucket diner just sold its fifth million dollar prize in the last 2 years appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Old South Diner in Nantucket sold its fifth million dollar lottery ticket in two years.
The Massachusetts Lottery Commission confirms the diner has had significant lottery success recently.
Local residents benefit from increased tourism and community engagement due to the diner’s lottery wins.

articles.title: School bus driver in crash that killed child was allegedly involved in hit-and-run months later
articles.description:
Prosecutors alleged that the bus driver failed to conduct a safety inspection and drove recklessly on the afternoon of the crash.

The post School bus driver in crash that killed child was allegedly involved in hit-and-run months later appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bus driver involved in fatal crash allegedly failed safety inspection and drove recklessly.
Driver was later implicated in a hit-and-run incident months after the initial crash.
Boston residents concerned about school bus safety and driver accountability following these incidents.

articles.title: 5 takeaways as Garrett Crochet, Marcelo Mayer steer Red Sox to 3-0 Opening Day win over Reds
articles.description:
So far, so good, as Boston played a complete game in Cincinnati.

summary: Red Sox secured a 3-0 victory against the Reds on Opening Day, March 26.
Garrett Crochet and Marcelo Mayer played pivotal roles in the win.
Boston fans celebrate a strong start to the season, boosting local morale.

articles.title: Trump says he’ll sign order to pay TSA agents as Congress struggles to reach funding deal
articles.description:
Trump announced his decision in a social media post saying he wanted to quickly stop the “Chaos at the Airports.”

The post Trump says he’ll sign order to pay TSA agents as Congress struggles to reach funding deal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump plans to sign an order to pay TSA agents amid funding issues.
This decision aims to alleviate airport chaos affecting travelers in Boston.
Local airports may see improved operations if TSA agents receive timely payments.

articles.title: Garrett Crochet throws 6 shutout innings as Red Sox defeat Reds 3-0
articles.description:
Roman Anthony had three hits for the Red Sox, who had their 11th opening day shutout — with all but one on the road.

The post Garrett Crochet throws 6 shutout innings as Red Sox defeat Reds 3-0 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Garrett Crochet pitched 6 shutout innings in the Red Sox's 3-0 victory over the Reds.
Roman Anthony contributed three hits, enhancing the team's offensive performance on opening day.
This marks the Red Sox's 11th opening day shutout, showcasing strong pitching for Boston fans.

articles.title: Body of Mass. man missing since escaping from a hospital in 2025 found in lake
articles.description:
The body of Leonard Mercury, 57, was found floating in a lake in Gardner nearly five months after his disappearance, officials said.

The post Body of Mass. man missing since escaping from a hospital in 2025 found in lake appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Leonard Mercury, 57, was found dead in a Gardner lake after missing since 2025.
His disappearance followed an escape from a hospital, raising safety concerns.
Local authorities are reviewing hospital security protocols to prevent future incidents.
